name: Pyrantel
description: Pyrantel is an anthelmintic agent for the oral treatment of various parasitic worm infections including ascariasis, hookworm infections, enterobiasis (pinworm infection), trichostrongyliasis, and trichinellosis. It resembles the properties of both competitive and depolarizing neuromuscular blocking agents, which explains the paralytic effect of the drug on parasites. Pyrantel is on the World Health Organization's List of Essential Medicines, the most effective and safe medicines needed in a health system.

interactions.name: Quinine
interactions.description: Quinine may increase the neuromuscular blocking activities of Pyrantel.
